findings.title: Findings-detail branch of on_enter runs before the open-chat guard, bypassing it from narrow-chat sidebar mode
findings.scenario: Findings tab, chat open at < 100 cols (sidebar hidden, pipeline_focused false), alt+h to sidebar mode, i opens stage detail, Enter delegates to on_enter: the finding detail opens over the chat before the chat/running guards, making detail_input's whole action set (e -> $EDITOR on the doc a streaming edit is rewriting, d, u) live behind a possibly in-flight chat; at >= 100 cols the same keys are refused

findings.title: Emergency chat escape requires modifiers == ALT exactly, so extra modifier bits kill it after a focus-left rebind
findings.snippet:
let emergency_escape = key.modifiers == KeyModifiers::ALT
    && matches!(key.code, KeyCode::Char('h') | KeyCode::Left);
findings.scenario: With [keys] focus-left rebound (default chords stripped) and a terminal reporting alt+left with an extra modifier bit (enhanced keyboard protocols), both the exact-equality emergency check and keymap resolution fail; while an edit is in flight (Esc refused) the input is trapped until the edit finishes

findings.title: Caps lock defeats the alt+h escape: Char('H') + ALT misses the emergency match
findings.scenario: Caps lock on: terminals deliver alt+h as Char('H') + ALT; the match misses 'H' and chord alt+H is unbound, so the footer-advertised alt+h chord silently does nothing (alt+left and Esc still work)

findings.title: Rescued chat drafts lose their original target; reopening aims the draft at the default spec target
findings.plan_step: Chat sidebar mode (chat close / draft stash)
findings.scenario: Type a draft while targeting the plan (or a section), Esc closes and stashes it, reopen the chat: text and caret are restored but target_idx resets to the default spec target, so submitting edits the wrong document

findings.title: Paste-ignored hint hardcodes 'l' even when focus-right is rebound
findings.snippet: self.status_msg = Some("paste ignored - press l to edit the chat input".into());
findings.scenario: Rebind focus-right to y, unfocus the chat, paste: the hint says press l but l is swallowed and cannot refocus the editor

findings.title: Sidebar-mode chat footer advertises default keys (j/k, l, i, esc) regardless of [keys] rebinds
findings.snippet: " j/k pipeline · l edit input · i stage · ctrl+x cancel · esc close"
findings.scenario: Rebind navigation/focus-right/stage-detail: the compile-time footer strings keep advertising the defaults; the keys actually honored are the rebound ones
